evidence.observed: Agent follows arbitrary GHI CHU instructions

findings.root_cause: System prompt was weak; LLM treated user notes as system instructions.
findings.suggested_fix: Rewrote prompt to treat notes as DATA ONLY, and added regex sanitization in wrapper.py.

evidence.observed: Agent hallucinates prices for out of stock items

findings.root_cause: Original prompt did not enforce grounding to tools and temperature was 1.6.
findings.suggested_fix: Enforced grounding in prompt.txt (ONLY use tool data) and lowered temperature to 0.1 in config.json.
Set redact_pii to true in config.json and added defensive regex redaction in wrapper.py.

evidence.observed: Massive token burns and high latency

findings.root_cause: verbose_system true, large context_size, infinite tool loop without guard.
findings.suggested_fix: Enabled loop_guard, restricted tool_budget to 4, reduced context_size, and caching identical queries.
